zh.lifeSummary: 當Josiah Perry Sr於1684年11月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，他的父親John Perry II40歲，母親Sarah Clary37歲。他於1708年1月12日與Bethiah Cutter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1684年住在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托。他去世於1767年9月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特伍斯特享年82歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特伍斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Josiah Perry Sr于1684年11月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，他的父亲John Perry II40岁，母亲Sarah Clary37岁。他于1708年1月12日与Bethiah Cutter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1684年住在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托。他去世于1767年9月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特伍斯特享年82岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Perry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Herry ‘son of Herry’, a variant of the personal name Harry (see Harris ).

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a pear tree (Middle English piri(e), peri(e), puri(e), Old English pirige, pyrige), or a habitational name for someone who owned or came from a place so named. This surname and a number of variants have been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

variants.name: Peery
meanings: Irish: variant of   Perry  , taken to Ireland at the time of thePlantation of Ulster and in the Cromwellian period.

variants.name: Pear
meanings: English: topographic name from residence by a pear tree (Middle English pere, Old English peru, pere). Compare Perry .
English: nickname from Middle English pere, Old French per, peer ‘peer or paragon’, also ‘companion’.

variants.name: Peary
meanings: History: Robert E. Peary (1856–1920) was a U.S.-born explorer, who in 1909 led the first successful expedition to the North Pole. Peary Land in the north of Greenland is named after him, as he explored there in 1892 and 1900.

variants.name: Perrie
meanings: Scottish: variant of Perry 2. Alternatively, perhaps from the Old French personal name Pierre; see Pierce .

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Perryman
meanings: English (Devon): elaborated form of Perry , with Middle English man, probably denoting one who lived near a pear tree; see Pearman .

nameMeanings.name: Josiah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘God heals’ in Hebrew; it is borne by a king of Judah, whose story is recounted in 2 Kings 22–23. This was fairly frequently used as a given name in the English-speaking world, especially among Dissenters, from the 18th to the late 19th century. Following several decades of disuse, this name has become increasingly fashionable since the 1970s, especially in the U.S. The spelling Josias was also in use among Puritans from the 16th century. The most famous English bearer is the potter Josiah Wedgwood ( 1730–95 ). In North America this was a recurrent name in the Quincy family of Massachusetts; the best-known Josiah Quincy ( 1744–75 ) was a pre-Revolutionary patriot, who died while returning from arguing the cause of the American colonists in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Josiah Perry Sr was born on 28 November 1684, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, John Perry II, was 40 and his mother, Sarah Clary, was 37. He married Bethiah Cutter on 12 January 1708, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States in 1684. He died on 16 September 1767, in Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82, and was buried in Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Josiah Perry Sr est né le 28 novembre 1684, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Perry II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sarah Clary, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Bethiah Cutter le 12 janvier 1708, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1684. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1767, à Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Josiah Perry Sr am 28. November 1684 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Perry II 40 und seine Mutter Sarah Clary 37. Er hat am 12. Januar 1708 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Bethiah Cutter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1684 hat er in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 16. September 1767 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Josiah Perry Sr è nato il il 28 novembre 1684 nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, John Perry II, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Clary, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Bethiah Cutter il 12 gennaio 1708, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1684. Morì il 16 settembre 1767, nel Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウン
ja.Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウオルセスターウオルセスター
ja.lifeSummary: Josiah Perry Srが1684年11月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで生まれた時，父John Perry IIは40歳，母Sarah Claryは37歳であった。1708年1月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでBethiah Cutterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1684年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンに住んでいた。彼は1767年9月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウオルセスターウオルセスターで82歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウオルセスターウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스

ko.Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운

ko.Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 워스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Josiah Perry Sr(이)가 1684년 11월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Perry II(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Clary(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1708년 1월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Bethiah Cutter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1684년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 살았다. 그는 1767년 9월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 워스스터에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Josiah Perry Sr nasceu em 28 de novembro de 1684, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Perry II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Clary, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Bethiah Cutter em 12 de janeiro de 1708, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1684. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1767, em Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Josiah Perry Sr родился 28 ноября 1684 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Perry II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Clary, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Bethiah Cutter 12 января 1708 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1684 году. Он умер 16 сентября 1767 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестир, ворсестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Josiah Perry Sr nació el 28 de noviembre de 1684, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Perry II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sarah Clary, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Bethiah Cutter el 12 de enero de 1708, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1684. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1767, en Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
